title: Update Recovery Plugin User
objective: A disposable source user with plugin pressure, dirty local edits, and a partial plugin install record for release update recovery testing.

setup.title: Write Update Recovery Plugin User
setup.intent: Create plugin-pressure state before running the target upgrade path.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs prepare update-recovery-plugin-user
evidence: dirty plugin local edit marker exists

setup.title: Verify Update Recovery Plugin User
setup.intent: Verify update, doctor repair, retry, and rollback did not destroy dirty plugin evidence.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs verify update-recovery-plugin-user
evidence: dirty plugin local edit checksum still matches

setupEvidence: dirty plugin local edit marker exists
cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes update recovery fixture files

source.note: stable release user with dirty plugin pressure
